Money Monster (2016)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $41,012,075Details
International Box Office $52,454,020
Worldwide Box Office $93,466,095
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $2,181,220
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $1,296,940
Total $3,478,160
Further financial details...

Synopsis

TV host Lee Gates and his producer Patty are put in an extreme situation when an irate investor who has lost everything forcefully takes over their studio. During a tense standoff broadcast to millions on live TV, Lee and Patty must work furiously against the clock to unravel the mystery behind a conspiracy at the heart of today's fast-paced, high-tech global markets.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$14,788,157 (36.1% of total gross)
Legs:2.77 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:43.9% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$27,000,000 (worldwide box office is 3.5 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,104 opening theaters/3,104 max. theaters, 3.7 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $56,705,709

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: May 13th, 2016 (Wide) by Sony Pictures
International Releases: May 12th, 2016 (Wide) (France)
May 12th, 2016 (Wide) (Italy)
May 12th, 2016 (Wide) (Netherlands)
May 12th, 2016 (Wide) (Portugal)
May 12th, 2016 (Wide) (Switzerland)
Video Release: August 16th, 2016 by Sony Pictures Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for language throughout, some sexuality and brief violence.
(Rating bulletin 2420 (Cert #49735), 4/13/2016)
Running Time: 98 minutes
Plot point: Corporate Malfeasance, Hostage, Media Circus, Strike, White Collar Crime
Social setting: TV Industry
Subgenre: Crime Thriller
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Thriller/Suspense
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Tri-Star Pictures, LStar Capital, Smokehouse Pictures, Allegiance Theater
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

TV host Lee Gates and his producer Patty are put in an extreme situation when an irate investor who has lost everything forcefully takes over their studio. During a tense standoff broadcast to millions on live TV, Lee and Patty must work furiously against the clock to unravel the mystery behind a conspiracy at the heart of today's fast-paced, high-tech global markets.
